commands.command: node --test --test-name-pattern "Failure Edge Recovery Permission Audit Failure Taxonomy" packages/control-plane/test/service.test.js

preliminary_expected_failures.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --output-format json < CP00-084 diff prompt
preliminary_expected_failures.failure_reason: Sandboxed Claude CLI could not read local login/auth state and returned Not logged in.
preliminary_expected_failures.resolved_by: Re-ran the same single intended read-only review outside the sandbox after approval; only the successful run is counted as the valid pack-level Claude review.

claude_review_command.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --output-format json < CP00-084 diff prompt

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: One valid claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review completed before production_ready.
evidence_summary.upstream_boundary: CP00-084 consumes CP00-083 and requires upstream next_subphase RP00.P07.M05.S01.
evidence_summary.finding_resolution: Claude P3 CP00-084-F1 and CP00-084-F2 were fixed by adding planned_pack_id drift, flipped boundary flag, and extra-key validator negative tests.
evidence_summary.ldip_boundary: LDIP remains planning-only; no LDIP implementation is introduced by CP00-084.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

CP00-084 is metadata-only and does not execute runtime permission evaluation, AuthZ, permission engine, runtime error responses, incident creation, observability writes, audit writes, database, storage, idempotency, lock, product-state, review-queue, or LDIP implementation logic.
